result:
**Goal: Add a Kaleidoscope / Symmetry Pattern Generator simulation mode.**

This would generate mesmerizing kaleidoscopic patterns with configurable N-fold symmetry (4, 6, 8, 12-fold). The simulation would feature radial symmetry reflection of procedurally animated seed patterns, color cycling through harmonious palettes, and interactive painting where strokes are mirrored across all symmetry axes in real-time. It's visually stunning, distinct from all 65 existing modes, and fits naturally into the Fractals & Chaos or Audio & Visual category.
